title: v2.0 AI Team Mode — architecture audit + MVP plan

transitions.note: Architecture audit complete. Existing schema fully covers MVP needs (mode_slug='ai-team-mode' already in DB constraint, tasks.settings JSONB stores team config, model_responses rows store step outputs). No migration required for MVP. Plan doc written at 42-v2-ai-team-mode-plan.md. Follow-up PRs: PR17 (no migration needed, skip), PR18 server helpers, PR19 /api/team-run route, PR20 /team UI, PR21 history integration, PR22 stabilization.

notes: Planning only. No runtime code in this PR. Next: PR18 creates src/lib/arena/team-mode.ts (role definitions + system prompts) and src/app/api/team-run/route.ts with unit tests. See 42-v2-ai-team-mode-plan.md for full spec.
